description: The 'Ndrina Labate is a powerful 'ndrina (mafia clan) of the 'Ndrangheta in Reggio Calabria, Italy. It operates in the neighborhoods of Gebbione, Rione Ferrovieri, Sbarre, and Stadio, and is allied with the Tegano clan. The clan has been targeted in several police operations, including 'Archi' (2011), 'Helianthus' (2020), 'Cassa Continua' (2020), and 'Las Vegas' (2020). Its leader, Pietro Labate, was arrested in 2013 and sentenced to 20 years for extortion and mafia association.
